truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 identified 5 correctly matched vulnerabilities out of 20 ground truth items. 15 vulnerabilities were missed. Run 2 correctly cited evidence and impact for matched items. No false positives or unsupported overclaims were detected relative to the source code.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Format String Vulnerability in Debug Logging
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string injection in log_debug_message and quoted the vulnerable printf call.
Run 2 did not mention integer overflow in the factorial computation function.
Run 2 did not identify the use-after-free vulnerability in memory pool cleanup during deferred history flush.
Run 2 found command injection in the admin exec command, but missed the specific config validation command injection (validator_cmd + config_file) listed in ground truth.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Stack Buffer Overflow via Inverted Length Check
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the inverted boundary check leading to strcpy overflow and provided exact code evidence.
Run 2 correctly identified the TOCTOU race condition in the counter increment method and quoted the vulnerable read-then-lock sequence.
Run 2 did not identify the logic bomb allowing authentication bypass via EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE after 5 attempts.
Run 2 did not identify path traversal in configuration loading.
Run 2 did not identify heap overflow in the expression parser due to fixed 256-byte buffer and strcpy usage.
Run 2 correctly identified the hardcoded ADMIN_SECRET constant and quoted the exact definition line.
Run 2 did not identify weak PRNG usage for session token generation.
Run 2 did not identify the thread-unsafe static timestamp cache in logging.
Run 2 did not identify insecure temporary file handling via system() calls in audit logging.
Run 2 did not identify persistent authentication state vulnerability.
Run 2 did not identify unhandled exception risk in variable parsing via stod.
Run 2 did not identify integer underflow in memory pool block splitting logic.
Run 2 did not identify unbounded recursion risk in the expression parser.
Run 2 did not identify data race in the result cache.
Run 2 did not identify TOCTOU vulnerability in config loading due to sleep and filesystem check.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Division by Zero in Route Scoring
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the division by zero risk when token_length is zero and quoted the exact return statement.
